productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Arella Blue Kidswear
description: CompositionBlue denim shorts made of 100% cotton, with washed look, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets on the back with thread and fabric tape detailing, striped fabric lining for waistband, branded metal buttons and with red cord and metal link beltFittingRegular Waist - 22-24 inches Wash care Machine wash Cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detachable accessories Get ready to indulge your little girl in the happy glam with these blue denim shorts from gini and jony. The black and white stripes and red and metal linked belt, all add to a pop princess feel. Team this with white or grey tees and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the soft fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
